name: THOR
description: The son of Odin taps into his divine power to call forth thunder and lightning, raining down relentless fury upon his enemies. With his mighty hammer Mjolnir in hand, Thor effortlessly asserts his dominance on the field of combat.
lore: Prince of Asgard and God of Thunder, Thor Odinson is one of the bravest warriors the cosmos has ever known. With his enchanted hammer in hand, Thor summons the full fury of the storm to smite his foes… but only if he proves himself worthy of Mjolnir’s might. Alas, Thor has suffered greatly since the Timestream Entanglement. When the All-Father was forced to enter his regenerative Odinsleep, Thor and his brother Loki battled for the throne. Through deceit and trickery, Loki bested his brother, exiling Thor to a distant and dangerous timeline.

abilities.name: Mjolnir Bash
abilities.description: Wield Mjolnir to strike enemies. When Awakened, Thor can launch lightning arc waves to deal damage

abilities.name: God of Thunder
abilities.description: Soar upwards and smite the ground after charging for a duration, inflicting damage on enemies within range

stats.Casting: A persistent spell field that generates a one-time spell field upon expiration
stats.Range: The sustained spell field is cylindrical, measuring 8m in radius and 20m in height, whereas the one-time spell field has an 8m spherical radius
stats.Damage: The sustained spell field lasts for 0.5s, dealing 40 damage, while the one-time spell field deals 220 damage
stats.Special Effect: After Ultimate Ability lands, Stun surrounding enemies for 1s

abilities.name: Storm Surge
abilities.description: Hold to spin Mjolnir before dashing forward and knocking back enemies

stats.Dash Distance: No charge: 10m; Full charge: 20m. When carrying an enemy, the ranges are 6m with no charge and 13m with full
stats.Damage: No Charge Damage: 40; Full Charge Damage: 60

abilities.name: Lightning Realm
abilities.description: Summon lightning that restores Thorforce based on the number of hit enemies

stats.Damage: Deal 40 damage when enemies cross the boundaries
stats.Special Effect: For each enemy within the spell area, 1 point of Thorforce is restored. Enemies that cross the boundary will be Slowed by 30%, Enemies that cross the boundary will receive an additional debuff that restricts aerial abilities for 2s.

abilities.name: Awakening Rune
abilities.description: Consume Thorforce to enter the Awakened state, granting Bonus Health and enhancing Mjolnir Bash

stats.Attack Interval: The first three stages last for 0.4s each, while the fourth stage lasts for 0.8s
stats.Damage: Projectile Damage: 70, Spell Field Damage: 15 per second
stats.Special Effect: Inflict damage over time on nearby enemies; After casting Awakening Rune, you can manually cancel the Awakened state after a brief delay. At the end of the Awakened state, Thor restores 1 point of Thunderforce.

abilities.name: Hammer Throw
abilities.description: Throw Mjolnir forward which then returns

stats.Casting: Launch a single-target projectile that returns after a delayed hit
stats.Projectile Speed: The projectile travels outward at a speed of 60m per second and returns at a speed of 80m per second
stats.Damage: Outward Projectile Damage: 50; Returning Projectile Damage: 25
stats.Special Effect: Hits grant 75 Bonus Health (only triggers once per throw, even if hitting multiple enemies)

abilities.name: Thorforce
abilities.description: Consume Thorforce to gain Bonus Health. Landing Mjolnir Bash on an enemy instantly recharges Thorforce

stats.Bonus Health Per Thorforce: Each point of Thorforce consumed grants 50 Bonus Health, while abilities that consume 3 points of Thorforce grant 150 Bonus Health

received.name: THUNDERSTRIKE PIKE
received.description: Angela shares fragments of her Ichors with Thor, empowering him to hurl a Thunder Spear that restores Thorforce for each enemy struck. Afterward, Thor can leap to the spear's explosion point, dealing a second wave of damage to all enemies within range

base.description: Receiving fatal damage prevents immediate defeat, Thor gains a decaying pool of Bonus Health. If he participates in a KO during this time, he resurrects and recovers a small amount of Health.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Hela, if either of them participates in a KO, Thor instantly revives, restoring Health equal to his remaining Bonus Health and gaining a Continuous Healing effect.

base.description: Hurl a Thunder Spear that restores Thorforce for each enemy struck. Afterward, Thor canleap to the spear's explosion point, dealing a second wave of damage to all enemies within range.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Angela, leaping to the Thunder Spear grants Bonus Health.
